brief: Global news highlights include the UK's modest GDP growth despite the Iran conflict, a fatal Bangkok bar fire, and US tariffs on Brazil. Meanwhile, research papers delve into generative AI adoption in public agencies, multivariate graph analysis, and human-robot gaze coordination.
news_summary: Key developments: UK economy grows 0.1% in May; Bangkok bar fire kills band members; US imposes 25% tariffs on Brazil; Ukraine dismisses defence minister; hundreds of Rohingya feared dead off Myanmar.
papers_summary: Papers investigate AI adoption in transportation departments, visual analysis of multivariate graphs, and the impact of bots on open-source projects. Other studies focus on multimodal emotion descriptors and real-time listener nodding generation.

en.brief: Global news highlights include the UK's modest GDP growth despite the Iran conflict, a fatal Bangkok bar fire, and US tariffs on Brazil. Meanwhile, research papers delve into generative AI adoption in public agencies, multivariate graph analysis, and human-robot gaze coordination.
en.news_summary: Key developments: UK economy grows 0.1% in May; Bangkok bar fire kills band members; US imposes 25% tariffs on Brazil; Ukraine dismisses defence minister; hundreds of Rohingya feared dead off Myanmar.
en.papers_summary: Papers investigate AI adoption in transportation departments, visual analysis of multivariate graphs, and the impact of bots on open-source projects. Other studies focus on multimodal emotion descriptors and real-time listener nodding generation.

zh.brief: 今日重點：皮尤調查顯示全球對中國好感度首次超越美國；香港國安法再拘捕獨立書店負責人；學術界對蔣方舟論文造假展開反思。同時，研究指出生成式AI在公部門的應用正面臨員工接納度的長期挑戰。
zh.news_summary: 皮尤研究中心調查指出，全球受訪者對中國的好感度20多年來首次超過美國，習近平信心度領先特朗普。香港國安法持續擴大，兩間獨立書店因涉嫌販賣「煽動」書籍被查，五人被捕。台灣解嚴39年之際，政治受難者後代積極解密檔案，追尋白色恐怖真相。
zh.papers_summary: 最新研究分析生成式AI在美國州交通局的長期採用，發現員工對AI的期待隨時間調整，影響組織變革。另有多篇論文探討多模態圖形分析、聊天機器人點頭生成等交互技術。

todays_image.caption: The crystals on Janet Jackson's microphone, once used for clear performance communication, contrast with the disrupted communications at the Telstra Senate inquiry and the Melbourne arrest.
todays_image.source_name: National Museum of African American History and Culture
todays_image.title: Microphone covered by crystals used by Janet Jackson
